jobs.description: Ensured the stability of a payment system handling over one million records per month by optimizing queries and improving database reliability.
achievements: Optimized complex queries, reducing response time by up to 80% and significantly improving overall system performance.
Developed webhook integrations for automated transaction listings, ensuring real-time synchronization and eliminating manual errors.
Conducted detailed transaction analysis using Python to identify inconsistencies in sales values, contributing to accurate financial reports.
jobs.technologies: PHP, Laravel, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Python, Linux, Git, Nginx, JavaScript, jQuery

jobs.description: Engineered a full-stack scheduling system for a travel agency, improving customer management efficiency.
achievements: Built a full-stack scheduling system using React and CodeIgniter, reducing manual booking errors for 500+ active users.
Designed and developed user-focused interfaces, improving UX/UI across multiple platforms.
Created a real-time credit simulator in React and TypeScript that dynamically calculated financing options, increasing loan conversion rates.
jobs.technologies: React, TypeScript, PHP, CodeIgniter, MySQL, Bootstrap, Python, React Native, Expo

jobs.description: Contributed to backend feature development in an agile team environment.
achievements: Developed backend features using Python and Docker, gaining hands-on experience with containerized deployments and code reviews.
Applied version control with Git, including repository creation, branch management, and code merging.

featured.title: Featured Project
featured.subtitle: End-to-end system architecture and AI integration
featured.name: Deepfake Detection System
featured.description: End-to-end AI system for detecting deepfakes in images and videos. Built with scalability and performance as core requirements, handling asynchronous processing and distributed workloads.
features: Asynchronous processing pipeline with Celery and Redis
Scalable architecture supporting concurrent analysis requests
EfficientNet-based AI model integration for real-time detection
REST API built with FastAPI for high-throughput operations
